title: rubus genevieri subsp. discerptus
intro: Rubus genevieri subsp. discerptus, also known as the dwarf raspberry or wood raspberry, is a plant species in the genus Rubus, which is a group of flowering plants in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high anthocyanin content, which has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus genevieri subsp. discerptus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as possessing antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
